{{Quote|We're also searching through the old Imperial archives at Kamparas, Boudolayz, and Obroa-skai, but so far we haven't found anything.|[[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]], about the [[Caamas Document]]|<ref name="SotP" />}}
'''Kamparas''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Dolomar sector/Legends|Dolomar sector]] of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] covered with rainforests, grasslands, rolling hills, and deep valleys.

==History==
The planet Kamparas was a lush world that was protected by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] to preserve its natural beauty and prevent it resources from being exploited by commercial development.<ref name="Force and Destiny" /> During the [[New Sith Wars]], [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Hoth (Jedi Lord)|Hoth]] rallied his allies on Kamparas and added their warriors to the group of Jedi from [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]], and [[Cularin/Legends|Cularin]] to form the [[Army of Light]] to directly combat [[Skere Kaan]]'s [[Brotherhood of Darkness/Legends|Brotherhood of Darkness]].<ref name="Warfare">''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]''</ref>

The Jedi Order established an [[Kamparas Jedi Training Center|auxiliary academy]] on the planet where several notable members, including [[Jorus C'baoth]], [[Lexia Ginorra]]<ref name="CatCW">''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]''</ref>, and [[Aris-Del Wari]]<ref name="Baby Ludi">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|52|jediwatch/13418_1.html|Baby Ludi Moved to Kamparas}}</ref> sought special studies under [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Masters]] including the wise mentor, [[Yaddle/Legends|Yaddle]]<ref name="PotJ">''[[Power of the Jedi Sourcebook]]''</ref>. The Jedi training facility was bolstered by a fleet of [[Delta-7 Aethersprite-class light interceptor/Legends|Delta-7 ''Aethersprite''-class light interceptors]] upon their introduction prior to the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].<ref name="Jedi Starfighter">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|47|jediwatch/13314_1.html|New Jedi Starfighter Unveiled}}</ref>

The training center lay dormant with the rise of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], and Imperial archives were later established on Kamparas, similar to those on [[Obroa-skai/Legends|Obroa-skai]] and [[Boudolayz]].<ref name="SotP" /> Records of the old Jedi facility were not in any Imperial databases.<ref name="Force and Destiny" />

{{Planet-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
{{Quote|Any Jedi born within the last ''30 years'' would know that weapon! It's the lightsaber of the Knight known as the ''"Howlrunner"''… the ''"Champion of Krmar"''… the ''"Defender of Kamparus"''… the ''"Hound of Worlds"''… the ''"Nemesis of the Kimm"''! It's the weapon of the Jedi hero ''Sharad Hett''—the most fearless and dedicated Knight of this age!|[[Ki-Adi-Mundi/Legends|Ki-Adi-Mundi]], to [[Eeth Koth/Legends|Eeth Koth]] and [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]]|<ref name="SW7">[[Star Wars (1998) 7|''Star Wars'' (1998) 7]]</ref>}}
The comic book [[Star Wars (1998) 7|''Star Wars'' (1998) 7]] referred to [[Sharad Hett]] as the "Defender of Kamparus." [[Jason Fry]], author of ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' and later works such as the "[[Star Systems of the Galaxy]]", indicated that Kamparus was considered a misspelling of Kamparas, and thus did not receive a separate system entry.<ref name="Fry">{{EmailCite|email=File:AtlasEmail-2025-07-31.png|author=[[Jason Fry]]|date=2025-07-31}}</ref>
